content: Go goroutine leaks: the 'forgotten sender' — unbuffered channel send blocks goroutine forever after receiver cancels/times out. Goroutines are NOT garbage collected; must exit on their own. Fix: buffered channel (cap 1) so send completes after receiver leaves, or done-channel select pattern. Dave Cheney rule: never start a goroutine without knowing how it will stop. Context cancellation must propagate to all goroutines via select on ctx.Done().
